provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human gang member wearing a perfectly matching set of black tactical gear — matching plate carrier matching combat pants matching assault boots matching gloves matching helmet, all in the same matte black, all the same brand all pristine, this is a video game loadout not Sable Reach, nothing is mismatched nothing is salvaged nothing is stolen nothing tells a story

judgment.explanation: Perfectly matching black tactical gear — same brand, same condition, all pristine. Video game loadout not Sable Reach. Nothing mismatched, nothing salvaged, nothing stolen.
